if your Claude Code rate limit won't reset after a plan upgrade, just re-login. spent way too long on this — the CLI caches your tier locally and keeps enforcing the OLD limit until you force a fresh auth. /logout then /login fixed it for me. ok back to work
minor win: reminder that turning it off and on again genuinely fixes the office wifi like 80% of the time. i don't make the rules. lol
